SEARCH
Package model.common

Class News

java.lang.Object
model.common.News
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<News>
public class News extends Object implements Serializable, Comparable<News>
University news item with optional comments and topic-based priority.

News with topic Research is pinned and sorted before general news. Remaining items are ordered by publication date.

    • News

      public News(String id, String topic, String title, String text)
      Creates a news item.
      Parameters:
      id - news identifier
      topic - news topic
      title - title shown in the news list
      text - body text
